projects.title: Saidia
projects.description: A desktop AI-powered application that helps teachers generate exam questions from learning materials. Powered by the Gemma 3N language model, it runs entirely offline and on-device. Developed for the Google Gemma 3 Hackathon.

projects.title: VeeCam
projects.description: This was a proof-of-concept virtual webcam that uses AI to apply video effects like background blurring (before it was popular in video calls) and other effects. I built it to solve my own poor lighting setup, it gained a few hundred users on the Chrome Web Store, and they requested new features but I abandoned it.

projects.title: Moments
projects.description: Imagine Wordle, but with pictures and AI that runs entirely on your device. It is a game that uses your own photos to generate words that you have to guess, just like Wordle.

projects.title: Simple Video Conferencing
projects.description: A video conferencing app built from scratch to understand real-time communication fundamentals (WebRTC, signaling, etc.).
